user.title: Configure GeoZones Mirror

data_description.geojson_source: e.g., domain.com/zones.json or a local path like /geozones/sweden.geojson
data_description.max_gps_accuracy: Location updates with accuracy worse than this threshold will be filtered out to prevent GPS drift.
data_description.wifi_ssid_sensor: Select your mobile companion app's Wi-Fi connection sensor (e.g., sensor.phone_wifi_connection).
data_description.home_ssids: Add your home Wi-Fi networks. Connecting to any of these will instantly anchor your state to your chosen Home Zone.
data_description.home_zone: The zone to anchor to when connected to any of the specified home Wi-Fi networks.

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure GeoZones Settings
reconfigure.description:
Update parameters or swap mapped tracking file assets for this active device tracker configuration. Standard `.geojson` or `.json` files formatted as GeoJSON are supported.

**Detected local files in /geozones/:**{local_files}

data_description.geojson_source: e.g., domain.com/zones.json or a local path like /geozones/sweden.geojson
data_description.max_gps_accuracy: Location updates with accuracy worse than this threshold will be filtered out to prevent GPS drift.
data_description.wifi_ssid_sensor: Select your mobile companion app's Wi-Fi connection sensor (e.g., sensor.phone_wifi_connection).
data_description.home_ssids: Add your home Wi-Fi networks. Connecting to any of these will instantly anchor your state to your chosen Home Zone.
data_description.home_zone: The zone to anchor to when connected to any of the specified home Wi-Fi networks.

error.processing_failed: The provided GeoJSON file is unreachable, structurally malformed, or breaks limits verification checks (max 2,500 zones or 250,000 vertices).
error.system_file_forbidden: You cannot use an internal system-generated file (starting with 'geozones_') as a source configuration asset.

abort.already_configured: This device tracker instance is already being mirrored by a GeoZones entry mapping configuration.

init.title: Reconfigure GeoZones Settings
init.description:
Modify parameters or switch tracking file sources for this active device tracking mirror instance. Standard `.geojson` or `.json` files formatted as GeoJSON are supported.

**Detected local files in /geozones/:**{local_files}

data_description.geojson_source: e.g., domain.com/zones.json or a local path like /geozones/sweden.geojson
data_description.max_gps_accuracy: Location updates with accuracy worse than this threshold will be filtered out to prevent GPS drift.
data_description.wifi_ssid_sensor: Select your mobile companion app's Wi-Fi connection sensor (e.g., sensor.phone_wifi_connection).
data_description.home_ssids: Add your home Wi-Fi networks. Connecting to any of these will instantly anchor your state to your chosen Home Zone.
data_description.home_zone: The zone to anchor to when connected to any of the specified home Wi-Fi networks.

error.processing_failed: The provided GeoJSON file is unreachable, structurally malformed, or breaks limits verification checks (max 2,500 zones or 250,000 vertices).
error.system_file_forbidden: You cannot use an internal system-generated file (starting with 'geozones_') as a source configuration asset.
